asset: LinkedIn Text Post: Manual Operations Waste
description: Write a LinkedIn post about how manual operations consume significant work time. Frame as general problem identification without specific metrics. End with a question about manual task time waste. CTA: invite download of a 2-field 'Manual Task Audit Checklist' lead magnet.

asset: LinkedIn Text Post: Automation Debt Signs
description: Write a LinkedIn post identifying common signs of automation debt: poor exception handling, data quality issues, brittle edge cases, lack of monitoring, over-complicated workflows. Frame as AI hype vs. operational reality. CTA: invite download of a 2-field 'Automation Health Assessment' template.

asset: LinkedIn Carousel Draft: From Pilot to Scale Failures
description: Create a LinkedIn carousel draft (5-7 slides) about common pilot-to-scale AI project failures: scope creep, lack of ROI tracking, technical debt, false positives. Frame as practical lessons without specific metrics. CTA: invite download of a 2-field 'Scale Planning Framework' guide. Note: carousel is stage-only in dashboard for now.
